operation_rows.domain: one exact nominal tag-only enum T (every variant nullary), including `Bool`

operation_rows.signature: `&'r place -> own slice<'r, T>` (a borrow of the whole array/buffer place)
`(T) -> own array<T, N>` (fills all N elements with the argument; T1)
`(u64, T) -> own buffer<T>` (allocates a flat buffer of the u64 length and fills every element; T1)

operation_rows.domain: equal-width primitive pairs: i8<->u8, i16<->u16, i32<->u32, i64<->u64, {i32,u32}<->f32, {i64,u64}<->f64

report_rows.fields: rule_id; message; node_path; function; stack_attribution (frame list: function, node_path); artifact_hash
function; per check: node_path, fact_class (bounds/overflow/alias/user), status (retained/eliminated), proof_ref (for eliminated: checker-derivation id)
function; per binding: name, mode, region, drop node_path (artifact-explicit)
